headline: Synapticure Launches Groundbreaking Ataxia Care Program, Expanding Access to Specialized Neurology Nationwide
summary: Synapticure, a leading virtual care company dedicated to improving access and outcomes for patients and caregivers living with neurodegenerative diseases, today announced the launch of a virtual ataxia care program. This program can help to provide timely access to specialized care for adults living with ataxias — a group of neurological conditions characterized by progressive loss of coordination, balance, and motor function. headline: Slate Medicines Appoints Mark W. Hahn to Board of Directors
summary: By Daniella Parra Slate Medicines, a private biotech company developing new treatments for migraine and other headache disorders, has appointed Mark W. Hahn to its Board of Directors, they said. The company said Hahn brings more than 25 years of life sciences leadership experience, including serving as CFO of Verona Pharma, where he helped guide […] The post Slate Medicines Appoints Mark W. Hahn to Board of Directors appeared first on ExecEdge.
